title: Conductive sheet and touch panel
abstract: A conductive component includes a first electrode pattern made of metal thin wires, and includes a plurality of first conductive patterns that extend in a first direction alternating with first non-conductive patterns. Each first conductive pattern includes break parts in portions other than intersection parts of the thin metal wires. The conductive component further includes a second electrode pattern made of thin metal wires, and includes a plurality of second conductive patterns that extend in a second direction orthogonal to the first direction and alternating with second non-conductive patterns. Each second conductive pattern includes break parts in portions other than intersection parts of thin metal wires.
claims: 1. A conductive component comprising: a first electrode pattern which is formed by a plurality of first grids made of metal thin wires that intersect with each other, the first electrode pattern including a plurality of first conductive patterns that extend in a first direction and being alternated with a plurality of first nonconductive patterns that electrically separate the first conductive patterns from each other, the metal thin wires of the first nonconductive patterns having first break parts in portions other than intersection parts of the metal thin wires of the first nonconductive patterns, the first break parts being formed of broken or discontinuous wires of the metal thin wires of the first nonconductive patterns; and a second electrode pattern which is formed by a plurality of second grids made of metal thin wires that intersect with each other, the second electrode pattern including a plurality of second conductive patterns that extend in a second direction orthogonal to the first direction and being alternated with a plurality of second nonconductive patterns that electrically separate the second conductive patterns from each other, the metal thin wires of the second nonconductive patterns having second break parts in portions other than intersection parts of the metal thin wires of the second nonconductive patterns, the second break parts being formed of broken or discontinuous wires of the metal thin wires of the second nonconductive patterns, wherein: the first electrode pattern and the second electrode pattern are arranged to face each other; each of the first grids has a rhomboid shape; and each of the second grids has a rhomboid shape.
